{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-02-23.
8,621 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-02-22 -> 2026-02-23)

- "Which organization will be identified as the owner of the Thai ammunition site struck by explosions by the end of February 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Royal Thai Army: 0.30, Thai Ministry of Defence: 0.10} | Truth: Border Patrol Police

- "Which state in southeastern Brazil will report at least 23 deaths from torrential-rain flooding by February 24, 2026?"
  Your prediction distribution: {Rio de Janeiro: 0.25, Sao Paulo: 0.22, Minas Gerais: 0.20, Espirito Santo: 0.12} | Truth: Minas Gerais
  Brier: +0.23 | TW-Score: +21.16

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 225 (183 resolved, 147 active)
- accuracy: 11.2% | brier skill score: 0.055 | time weighted score: 1639.30
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions"}
